creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

I have new information.

poudriere.conf:
BUILD_AS_NON_ROOT=no  <--- works fine
BUILD_AS_NON_ROOT=yes <--- throws error

I could switch to build as root, but perhaps for the sake of knowledge, is there some jail knob I could push so I can build as non root in jailed poudriere as well?
